text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 179 

GAP_OONP_COPAY_3M 

LABEL: Gap Out-of-Network Pharmacy Copay for 3-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a 3-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_OONP_COPAY_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS
